name: rakshak-ai-root
description: Root orchestrator for the Rakshak AI web app, Node relay, and Python LangGraph agent

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "FRONTEND,NODE,AGENT" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix backend-node" "python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000 --app-dir backend-python"
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend-node && pip install -r backend-python/requirements.txt
